indexes.expression: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_activity_slug_unique" ON "activity" ("slug") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_activity_deleted_at" ON "activity" ("deleted_at") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_availability_slot_activity_id" ON "availability_slot" ("activity_id") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_availability_slot_deleted_at" ON "availability_slot" ("deleted_at") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_slot_activity_date_time" ON "availability_slot" ("activity_id", "date", "start_time") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_booking_reference_unique" ON "booking" ("reference") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_booking_idempotency_key_unique" ON "booking" ("idempotency_key") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_booking_activity_id" ON "booking" ("activity_id") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_booking_slot_id" ON "booking" ("slot_id") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_booking_deleted_at" ON "booking" ("deleted_at") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_school_program_slug_unique" ON "school_program" ("slug") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_school_program_deleted_at" ON "school_program" ("deleted_at") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
